content:
# Petrogenesis

**Summary**: The process by which rocks are formed and changed over time.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] investigated petrogenetic processes of the xenoliths.

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] investigated the petrogenesis of NW Midyan granitoids.

- [[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024]] investigated the petrogenesis of the Al-Ghurayyah pluton.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] Understanding the petrogenetic history helps determine the source and modification of the mantle material.

- [[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024]] investigated the petrogenesis of NW Midyan granitoids.

- [[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024]] investigated the petrogenesis of the Al-Ghurayyah pluton.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] Determined through bulk-rock chemistry and mineral chemistry analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The study aim is to provide comprehensive bulk-rock chemistry and additional mineral chemistry analysis to determine the petrogenetic processes undergone by Harrat Uwayrid mantle xenoliths. ([[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023, p. 27]])

- Determined that some I-types were derived from slab failure during the Ediacaran. ([[2024-al-hakimi|Al-Hakimi, 2024, p. 17]])

- Petrogenesis is attributed to mantle-derived magmas from lithospheric mantle delamination. ([[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024, p. 16]])
